TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tatangahan u kakawsan nu mita i ayaw, i ayawayaw, i tida ku kakawsan nu mita, yadah ku lalacan atu sadipit i bayu. u nalalacanan a niyadu'. hey ya o hey ya o ho i ya ha ay, u setenesay a niyadu' nu Sakizaya nu mita, satimulan, saamisan, sawalian, sasatipan, Sakul, Cipawkan, Takubuwan, Ciwidian atu Cibalbalan. ayda amana pakatawal kita, sayaway katukuhan nu kakawsan ita, ayda amana pakatawal kita, u kapahay a lala' nu Takubuwan.
S.PHON: tataŇčańßan u kakawsan nu mita i ajaw, i ajawajaw, i tida ku kakawsan nu mita, jadańß ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶an atu sadipit i baju. u nar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶anan a nijadu Ē~ °. ńß…ô ja o ńß…ô ja o ńßo i ja ńßa aj, u s…ôt…ôn…ôsaj a nijadu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja nu mita, satimur~…ĺan, saamisan, sawar~…ĺian, sasatipan, sakur~…ĺ, ¶ipawkan, takubuwan, ¶iwidian atu ¶ibar~…ĺbar~…ĺan. ajda amana pakatawar~…ĺ kita, sajawaj katukuńßan nu kakawsan ita, ajda amana pakatawar~…ĺ kita, u kapańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu takubuwan.
S.FORM: tatangahan u kakawsan nu mita i ayaw, i ayawayaw, i tida ku kakawsan nu mita, yadah ku lalacan atu sadipit i bayu. u nalalacanan a niyadu'. hey ya o hey ya o ho i ya ha ay, u setenesay a niyadu' nu Sakizaya nu mita, satimulan, saamisan, sawalian, sasatipan, Sakul, Cipawkan, Takubuwan, Ciwidian atu Cibalbalan. ayda amana pakatawal kita, sayaway katukuhan nu kakawsan ita, ayda amana pakatawal kita, u kapahay a lala' nu Takubuwan.
